name: Crazy Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Put the sifted flour, sugar, and cocoa into an 8-inch square pan.
3. Add the salt and baking soda and mix well.
4. Make three holes in the flour mixture evenly spaced across the top of the pan.
5. Place vinegar in the first hole, water and vanilla in the second hole, and shortening in the third hole.
6. Mix everything until smooth.
7. Bake for 35 minutes.
8. Frost with fudge frosting.
